__Types of Adverbs__ →

items: 1) Time (when) → soon, late, early, yet, ago, yesterday, tomorrow, so far etc.
2) Place (where) → here, there, Somewhere, nowhere, upstairs, downstairs, up, down etc.
3) Manner (how) → easily, carefolly, politely, nicely, rudely, bravely, arrogantly.
4) frequency (how often) → daily, often, always, every day, regularly, occasionally
5) Degree (intensity ↑/↓) → so, very, too, enough, much, far, a lot etc.
6) Relative & Interrogative → why, where, when, ~~w~~ how etc.
